backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Question, Test, TestResult) and all backend logic including admin management, user registration, question/test CRUD, test submission, leaderboard, and results retrieval with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Defines a migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new actor state by initializing the `adminPrincipal` field to null.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three admin-related frontend features (useIsCallerAdmin query, Admin Panel navbar link, Admin page access guard) to their source files, components, and test requirement IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Concept Delta' that mounts the app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with five routes (/, /dashboard, /test/$testId, /admin, /results) and renders the app via RouterProvider with a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddQuestio: Modal dialog for admins to add a new question by providing image URLs for the question and four options, selecting the correct answer, and submitting via the useAddQuestion mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/Leaderboar: Displays a ranked leaderboard table of students sorted by average score, with color-coded rank badges for top 3 and score badges colored by performance tier.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuestionGa: Admin gallery view that lists all questions as cards showing question and option images with the correct answer label, and includes a button to open the AddQuestionModal.
frontend/src/components/admin/ResultsLis: Admin table component that displays all test submission results including user ID, test name, score, and submission timestamp, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestBuilde: Admin component for creating new tests by selecting questions, setting name/subject/duration, and managing publish/unpublish status of existing tests.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserList.t: Admin component that fetches and displays all registered users in a table showing their name, class, and contact number.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navy navbar that handles login/logout via Internet Identity, silently attempts to claim admin on login, and conditionally renders the Admin Panel link only when the user is authenticated and isAdmin is strictly true, for both desktop and mobile menus.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-screen modal for first-time users to set up their profile by entering full name, class (11th/12th/Dropper), and contact number, with validation and backend save via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
Renders a single quiz question with its image and four option images as selectable buttons, highlighting the currently selected answer with a navy border and label badge.
frontend/src/components/TestCard.tsx: Displays a summary card for a test including its name, subject, duration, and question count, with a 'Start Test' button that navigates to the test route.
frontend/src/components/TestTimer.tsx: Countdown timer component that counts down from a given duration in seconds, triggers a callback when time expires, and turns red with a pulsing icon when under 60 seconds remain.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, admin checks, published tests, questions, test submission, results, leaderboard, and admin CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/utilities, OKLCH-based navy color palette CSS variables for light/dark themes, and custom utility classes for navy color usage.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page that checks authentication and admin status, redirecting or showing an access-denied screen as needed, and renders tabbed sections for managing questions, tests, users, results, and leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Authenticated user dashboard that displays stat cards (tests attempted, average score, best score) and a list of published test cards, with a profile setup modal shown if the user has no profile.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, feature highlights, and a CTA button that triggers Internet Identity login or navigates to the dashboard, also showing a profile setup modal for newly authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Empty leaderboard page file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Authenticated page that fetches and displays the user's past test submissions in a table showing test name, score, percentage, and submission date.
frontend/src/pages/Test.tsx: Test-taking page that renders questions one at a time with a timer, tracks user answers, handles submission, and shows a post-submission answer review with correct/incorrect highlighting.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with navy color palette, OKLCH CSS-variable-based semantic colors, custom fonts, border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for 'Concept Delta', a MHT-CET test series site, documenting architecture decisions, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata for the build planner.
